budget.policy: Use this packet first. Expand only listed specs/code/evidence when phase or stale revision requires exact source.

task.title: Model research evidence as support for wiki knowledge
task.summary: Separate external/source research from task execution so research evidence supports `.wiki/knowledge` claims rather than becoming part of every implementation loop.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki distinguishes research evidence for intended knowledge from execution evidence for task closure.
acceptance: Research workflow records cited findings as support for knowledge updates and design decisions.
Task execution loop treats research as optional only when uncertainty blocks implementation or claims need support.
Evidence schema or conventions distinguish source/research evidence from checks/execution evidence.
The research skill explains when to use web/code research versus local code inspection.
non_goals: Require web research for routine code changes.
Create a separate ADR system outside `.wiki/knowledge`.
verification: Review evidence entries produced by sample research and sample task execution for clear classification.
Run codewiki state refresh and confirm no generated state is hand-edited.

delta.desired: Research strengthens canonical knowledge without bloating task execution.
delta.current: Research is described as optional evidence but not modeled as a distinct workflow.
delta.closure: Add research-specific workflow guidance and evidence classification.

specs.title: Product
specs.summary: Product intent and navigation for CodeWiki's users, stories, and surfaces.

specs.title: Runtime Policy
specs.summary: Policy boundary for codewiki runtime access in codewiki.

evidence.summary: Verified research evidence model implementation after final checks.
